project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Static sprite displayed when player is airborne
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y varies from 0 to -90px (max jump height)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed during entire jump arc from takeoff to landing, triggered by Space key or tap input

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with both feet off ground, legs tucked
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Single static frame showing airborne pose with legs tucked under body

visual_specification.details: Both feet clearly off ground, body in mid-air pose, tail extended for balance, eyes open

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions and color as player_idle, player_run, player_dead
relationships.differences_from: player_run is animated (2 frames), player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px), player_jump is static single frame
